productDisplayName: Puma Men 3.0 Mid Black Sports Shoe
description: This high top Basketball shoe from puma is 100% focused on providing the best performance, offering you the chance to excel at your game. This shoe clearly says you take your sport seriously – whether you wear it on or off the court. Upper Leather uppers for durability and structure Lace-ups for a snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name embossed and printed on the tongue Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole for absolute grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
